arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai's reaction speaks volumes after Darwin Nunez's howler for Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool could only manage a draw against Aston Villa in the Premier League as they came back from behind to share the spoils but Darwin Nunez's miss denied the Reds three points

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool's away record can be difference in title race
arts.sum: After that equaliser by Everton and the wobble at home to Wolves, Liverpool knew that victory against Aston Villa would take their advantage over Arsenal into double digits. They came close. A point was the least they deserved from an entertaining 2-2 draw.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa fans deliver their verdict on Marcus Rashford’s first start for the club in draw with Liverpool
arts.sum: Aston Villa held Premier League leaders to a 2-2 draw in Wednesday’s league encounter at Villa Park. Liverpool opened the scoring through Mohamed Salah’s 29th-minute...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains Luis Diaz decision and reasons behind surprise Liverpool change
arts.sum: Liverpool lined-up with just two forward for their Premier League clash at Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Amadou Onana breaks silence on injury as he reveals when he will return for Aston Villa
arts.sum: Amadou Onana breaks silence on injury as he reveals when he will return for Aston Villa Amadou Onana has given an update on his return from injury for Aston Villa .

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Virgil van Dijk points the finger at team-mate as Arne Slot speaks out
arts.sum: Liverpool were held to a 2-2 draw away at Aston Villa on Friday night but still managed to extend their lead over Arsenal at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold Real Madrid latest - La Liga threats, Liverpool pledge and contract claim
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold continues to be heavily linked with a move to Real Madrid, with his Liverpool contract set to expire this summer

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Liverpool eye Núñez/Isak swap, Man United want former Man City striker
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Unai Emery pays Liverpool ultimate compliment as he delivers verdict on Aston Villa draw
arts.sum: Unai Emery offers his reaction after his Aston Villa drew 2-2 at home to Premier League leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Unai Emery issues Aston Villa refusal as Boubacar Kamara point raised after 2-2 draw with Liverpool
arts.sum: Unai Emery insists he will never punish his players for their mistakes after Andres Garcia made an error which led to Liverpool's opening goal in tonight's 2-2 thriller at Villa Park. In his post-match press conference Emery was asked about Garcia's mistake, and said: "The same problem we were having two years ago and sometimes last year, but we are trying to analyse and get better.
